description: 跨平台官方 Codex 桌面应用的安装 / 增量更新 / 干净卸载管理器，内置国内可达的镜像自更新。Cross-platform installer & updater for the official Codex desktop app — incremental updates, clean uninstall, China-reachable self-update
notes:
config location: C:\Users\<your username>\AppData\Local\io.github.wangnov.codexappmanager
config location: C:\Users\<your username>\\AppData\\Roaming\wangnov - https://github.com/vicrack/scoop-bucket/blob/master/bucket/codex-app-manager.json https://github.com/vicrack/scoop-bucket
